working_on.notes: Dead code cleanup completed. Deleted SearchOverlay.tsx and SearchAutocompleteDropdown.tsx.

pending_tasks.task: Sprint 4 kickoff: onboard 1-2 recruiter nội bộ and capture friction logs
Test search dropdown UX on mobile devices (responsive check)
Consider upgrading Postgres SSL connection strings to sslmode=verify-full (requires Neon CA cert)

recent_changes.description: Deleted dead code: SearchOverlay.tsx (317 lines) and SearchAutocompleteDropdown.tsx (180 lines). Neither was imported anywhere — replaced by inline dropdown panels in HeroSection and PublicHeader. Total: ~497 lines removed.

Redesigned search UI to TopCV-style inline dropdown panels: 2-column layout (keywords+employers left, jobs right) that drops down below the search bar. Both HeroSection and PublicHeader use same pattern. Added accent-insensitive location filter (removeTones). Fixed location/button overlap.
Added NavigationProgress (top loading bar) + skeleton loading.tsx for 10 dashboard routes. Fixed empty space on Dashboard grid layout.
Comprehensive QA of 8 Admin CRM pages + 7 public pages. All 15 pages passed. Created detailed walkthrough with screenshots.
Completed performance hardening: GIN trigram indexes, Suspense streaming dashboard, cached public homepage/filters, shared access-scope module, and ISR blog page

errors_encountered.error: Search overlay covered entire screen (fullscreen takeover) instead of inline dropdown
errors_encountered.solution: Replaced SearchOverlay approach with inline dropdown panels that appear directly below the search bar, matching TopCV design pattern

errors_encountered.error: Location input ChevronDown arrow overlapped search button
errors_encountered.solution: Wrapped location + button in a shrink-0 flex group with proper gap spacing

errors_encountered.error: Typing without diacritics (e.g., 'Hai Phong') did not match Vietnamese locations
errors_encountered.solution: Added removeTones() function using NFD normalization to strip Vietnamese diacritics for accent-insensitive filtering

decisions_made.decision: Use inline dropdown panels instead of fullscreen search overlay
decisions_made.reason: User wanted TopCV-style: dropdown sổ xuống ngay dưới search bar, not covering the whole page

decisions_made.decision: Two separate dropdowns: one for keyword search (2-column), one for location
decisions_made.reason: Follows TopCV pattern: each input has its own dropdown, only one open at a time

decisions_made.decision: Use NFD normalization for Vietnamese accent-insensitive search
decisions_made.reason: Users commonly type without diacritics (e.g., 'Hai Phong' should match 'Hải Phòng')

decisions_made.decision: Hero section always expanded (removed collapsible expand-from-header mechanism)
decisions_made.reason: Simplifies UX - hero search is always visible on homepage

verification.notes: Zero TypeScript errors after search redesign
Hero dropdown, header dropdown, location dropdown all working. 2-column layout visible.
